source.title: ctDNA-Guided Adjuvant Atezolizumab in Muscle-Invasive Bladder Cancer.

finding.description: The median disease-free survival was 9.9 months with atezolizumab, compared to 4.8 months with placebo.
finding.effect_summary: Atezolizumab significantly improved disease-free survival compared to placebo.

source_quote: The median disease-free survival was 9.9 months with atezolizumab, as compared with 4.8 months with placebo (hazard ratio for first event of disease recurrence or death, 0.64; 95% confidence interval [CI], 0.47 to 0.87; P=0.005).

source.title: ctDNA-Guided Adjuvant Atezolizumab in Muscle-Invasive Bladder Cancer.

finding.description: The median overall survival was 32.8 months with atezolizumab, compared to 21.1 months with placebo.
finding.effect_summary: Atezolizumab significantly improved overall survival compared to placebo.

source_quote: The median overall survival was 32.8 months with atezolizumab, as compared with 21.1 months with placebo (hazard ratio for death, 0.59; 95% CI, 0.39 to 0.90; P=0.01).

source.title: ctDNA-Guided Adjuvant Atezolizumab in Muscle-Invasive Bladder Cancer.

finding.description: 28% of patients receiving atezolizumab and 22% of those receiving placebo had grade 3 or 4 adverse events.
finding.effect_summary: Higher incidence of grade 3 or 4 adverse events with atezolizumab compared to placebo.

source_quote: A total of 28% of the patients who received atezolizumab and 22% of those who received placebo had adverse events of grade 3 or 4.

source.title: ctDNA-Guided Adjuvant Atezolizumab in Muscle-Invasive Bladder Cancer.

finding.description: Disease-free survival was 95% at 1 year and 88% at 2 years among patients with persistent ctDNA-negative status.
finding.effect_summary: High disease-free survival rates among ctDNA-negative patients.

source_quote: Among 357 patients with persistent ctDNA-negative status, disease-free survival was 95% at the end of the 1-year monitoring period and 88% at 2 years.
